const p=$input.first().json;const fin=p.financials||{};const date=new Date().toLocaleDateString('en-GB');const subj='Customer Profile Added: '+p.companyName+' ('+p.companyNumber+')';const html='

Customer Profile Saved

Profile for '+p.companyName+' ('+p.companyNumber+') saved on '+date+'

Ranking'+p.customerRanking+'/10
Products'+(p.products||[]).join(', ')+'
Address'+p.address+'
SIC Codes'+(p.sicCodes||[]).join(', ')+'
Incorporated'+(p.incorporated||'Unknown')+'
Directors'+(p.directors||[]).join('
')+'
Turnover'+(fin.turnover?'\u00a3'+fin.turnover.toLocaleString():'Not extracted')+'
Employees'+(fin.employees||'Not extracted')+'
Net Assets'+(fin.netAssets?'\u00a3'+fin.netAssets.toLocaleString():'Not extracted')+'
Accounts Year'+(fin.accountsYear||'Unknown')+'

Generated '+new Date().toISOString()+' via n8n / amelai

';return[{json:{subject:subj,htmlBody:html}}];
